lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new model. Every aspect of the car, from the flawless exterior paint with its deep, factory shine to the immaculate interior, has been meticulously maintained. There are no scratches, dents, or signs of wear anywhere. Mechanically, it performs perfectly, with all systems functioning as they did the day it left the factory. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking showroom quality.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The original factory paint is flawless with a mirror-like finish, and the interior is pristine, showing no signs of use. Mechanically, it performs as if it just rolled off the assembly line, with every feature functioning perfectly and a complete service history included. This is a rare, collector-grade example in truly mint condition.

Get ready for a dependable ride that’s seen some miles but still has plenty of life left! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some expected signs of wear and tear from its time on the road, but it remains a solid and reliable choice for your daily commute. It’s a great way to get a quality vehicle at a budget-friendly price!

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional.
The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows wear and staining on the upholstery. Mechanical systems are currently operational.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and it is honestly in spectacular condition. It’s been pampered since day one and looks just as stunning as the day I bought it—seriously, it's like-new inside and out! It drives like a dream and has been kept in a climate-controlled garage. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks perfect, this is the one for you!
This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of mechanical preservation, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six equipped with individual throttle
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. All maintenance current.

Step into the driver’s seat of a vehicle that feels as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. This pristine example has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, maintaining a flawless factory paint job with a deep, mirror-like finish. The exterior is entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or blemishes, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and without a single crease, while every button and switch retains its original tactile snap. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance history performed exclusively by master technicians. This car has never seen rain or snow and has been driven only on fair-weather weekends to ensure its mechanical integrity remains absolute. All original documentation, both sets of keys, and a comprehensive binder of service records are included. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade masterpiece.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, mirroring its original showroom state with uncompromising fidelity. Every surface reflects meticulous stewardship, ensuring an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning collector. Experience the pinnacle of performance and aesthetic preservation.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive excellence, preserved in exemplary showroom condition. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, it exhibits no discernible wear and retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure absolute integrity, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire an investment-grade specimen of unrivaled quality.

Hey! 👋 Looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag? This car is in absolute pristine, mint condition! I’ve babied it since the day I got it, and it seriously looks like it belongs on a showroom floor. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. I’m so excited for someone to enjoy this beauty as much as I have—come check it out!

This E46 M3 is a pristine example of BMW M-division engineering, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The mechanical integrity is superlative, with a reinforced rear subframe and a recently serviced Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox ensuring crisp engagement. The chassis remains taut, utilizing factory-spec suspension components and a limited-slip differential for neutral handling characteristics. Every aspect of this vehicle, from the flawless Alpine White finish to the impeccable Nappa leather interior, reflects a life of climate-controlled storage and rigorous preventative maintenance. A rare, turn-key opportunity for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Mechanically perfect.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Hey there! I'm honestly so excited to show you this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and it’s in truly pristine, showroom-level condition! I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it garage-parked and meticulously maintained, so it looks and drives just like new. If you're looking for something that’s been loved and cared for perfectly, this is the one for you. I’d love for it to go to a great home—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. This specimen has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a reinforced rear subframe and a fully overhauled VANOS system for optimal cam timing. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, while the M-variable limited-slip differential ensures surgical power delivery. The factory paint shows original depth across all panels, and the engine bay is free of any fluid weepage or heat-cycle fatigue. A mechanically superlative example of BMW’s high-revving naturally aspirated era.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Full service records. Price firm.

Experience automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless original paint and pristine interior. Every inch of the cabin feels brand new, with leather seats that show zero signs of wear and a dashboard that retains its factory-fresh appearance. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history and a drive that is as smooth and powerful as the day it rolled off the lot. From the gleaming wheels to the untouched trunk space, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It is a rare find for a discerning collector or driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an exacting standard that transcends the typical pre-owned experience. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a machine of peerless quality and uncompromising mechanical stature.

We are pleased to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition, boasting an immaculate exterior finish and a flawless interior environment. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for performance and reliability. For the discerning driver who demands perfection, this vehicle stands as a testament to superior stewardship and remains in showroom-quality state.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total gem. This car has been pampered since day one—always garaged, hand-washed, and kept in truly pristine condition. It looks and drives just like it’s brand new! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and meticulously cared for, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

2022 model. Immaculate condition. Zero defects. Garage kept. Full service records available.

Offering a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents in showroom condition. The exterior finish is flawless, retaining its deep, factory-original luster with no stone chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium upholstery is immaculate, the dashboard is free of any UV damage, and it still carries that new-car scent. Every feature, including the climate control, navigation, and premium audio system, operates exactly as it did the day it was delivered. Mechanically, this car has been pampered with an open-checkbook maintenance philosophy, documented by a complete service history. It has been strictly garaged and never driven in inclement weather. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this is the finest example currently on the market.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to automotive excellence.
